title: Communauté de communes du Bosc d'Eawy
summary: The Communauté de communes du Bosc d’Eawy  was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created on 1 January 2002. It was dissolved on 1 January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Bosc d’Eawy  was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created on 1 January 2002. It was dissolved on 1 January 2017.
